title: Create Revolution
description: Over-the-top modpack focused on Create mod, aesthetic improvements and quality of life.
body:
# Create: Revolution
Join the Revolution! What revolution? I have no idea!

Revolution adds a variety of mods, but not really. Its all focused on Create, with some random things from the search results thrown in there too. Theres like a ridiculous amount of Create mod addons.

I wanted this to be a modpack you can play with a handful of friends, and have a good time. There's lots to explore both throughout the world and in the recipe book. Hopefully this can also be a good starting point for Create, because there's endless possibilities, while still focused on the Create mod.

There's some cool things in here, like Valkyrien Skies addons. The one I'm most excited for, is probably [VS Addition](https://modrinth.com/mod/vs-addition). It adds an insane amount of compatibility between Create and VS, so go make something with it, it's super cool. [Immersive Weathering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-weathering) is another crazy mod, it really changes how the game feels, lots of small details adding up to make one great mod. Go check it out [here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-weathering)

If you find something while playing this modpack that you really love, go check out the original mod's page to support its creator.

## Important Notice
Due to the in-beta nature of some of the mods, the modpack is a *little* unstable, so make frequent backups of your worlds, or just try your luck.
